title: research-brief
description: Research a topic and produce a structured output.

question.description: The research question -- specific beats broad

depth.description: quick=5min/3 sources, standard=15min/8 sources, deep=30min+/15+ sources

output_file.description: Path to write output. If omitted, returns in response.

constraints.description: Any restrictions (e.g. 'only sources from 2025+', 'focus on competitors')

_anti_patterns: Post numbers without verification. Dates, timelines, metrics -- if it can be fact-checked, check it.
Optimize without measuring. Complete data > partial data > no data.
Check local/installed alternatives before cloud APIs.
